name: t12-duration-humanize
prompt: The test suite references App.DurationFormatter.Humanize(int totalSeconds), which isn't implemented yet, so the build currently fails. Create src/App/DurationFormatter.cs with `public static string Humanize(int totalSeconds)` so the whole test suite passes. Spec: split the total into days (86400 s), hours (3600 s), minutes (60 s) and seconds, then return ONLY the non-zero units, largest-first, each formatted as "<n><suffix>" with suffixes d/h/m/s, joined by single spaces — e.g. 3661 -> "1h 1m 1s", 3601 -> "1h 1s" (the zero minutes is omitted), 90061 -> "1d 1h 1m 1s". Return "0s" when totalSeconds is 0. Throw ArgumentOutOfRangeException when totalSeconds is negative. Do not modify the existing tests.
